content: {"pass": false, "issues": [{"problem": "Attorney-review disclaimer is required \"at top of output\" per checklist but appears as Section 17 near the end, not at the top.", "fix": "Move or duplicate the attorney-review disclaimer to the very beginning of the document before the title."}, {"problem": "Checklist items about \"Market-standard benchmarks\", \"Jurisdiction-specific rules\", \"Flow-down obligations\", \"NNN maintenance matrix\", \"Ratification clause for amendments and subleases\", and \"ADS fixed defaults / Pakistan labour law\" are not addressed or evidenced in the draft.", "fix": "Add brief clauses or annotations explicitly confirming each checklist item has been considered or is not applicable, or include the required matrices/tables where relevant."}]}
